$schema_note: Purpose definition. The set of available purposes is discovered by scanning config/purposes/*.json — add or remove files freely. See examples/purposes/ for more elaborate setups.
description: Feature development, bug fixes and refactoring across code repositories.
mcp_servers_note: Names of servers from templates/default/mcp.json to enable for tasks of this purpose. Empty = none.
dev_kinds_note: Optional sub-classification asked by /open-task. A matching templates/purposes/dev/kinds/<kind>/ directory can override templates per kind; otherwise the purpose-level templates are used.
